files.patch:
@@ -1,19 +1,25 @@
 {
   "name": "@vibeinsights/cli",
-  "version": "0.0.1",
+  "version": "0.0.2",
   "type": "module",
   "main": "dist/index.js",
   "files": [
     "dist"
   ],
+  "publishConfig": {
+    "access": "public"
+  },
   "scripts": {
     "start": "bun run src/index.ts",
-    "build": "bun build ./src/index.ts --outdir ./dist --target bun",
+    "build": "bun build ./src/index.ts --outdir ./dist --target bun --external @napi-rs/keyring --production",
+    "prepublishOnly": "bun run build",
     "typecheck": "tsc --noEmit --project tsconfig.json"
   },
+  "dependencies": {
+    "@napi-rs/keyring": "^1.2.0"
+  },
   "devDependencies": {
     "@vibeinsights/shared": "workspace:*",
-    "@napi-rs/keyring": "^1.2.0",
     "better-auth": "^1.3.27",
     "open": "^10.2.0"
   }
